name: Category Theory — Limits & Adjunctions
description: Limit: universal cone over diagram. Product, equalizer, pullback. Colimit: universal cocone. Coproduct, coequalizer, pushout. Adjunction: F ⊣ G with unit η and counit ε.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Cone\nover diagram J"]
    D2["Def: Limit\nuniversal cone"]
    D3["Def: Product\nA×B with π₁ π₂"]
    D4["Def: Coproduct\nA+B with ι₁ ι₂"]
    D5["Def: Adjunction\nF ⊣ G, η, ε"]
    T1["Thm: Product unique\nup to iso"]
    T2["Thm: Hom F-,- ≅ Hom -,-G"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D2 --> D4
    D3 --> T1
    D5 --> T2
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4,D5 definition
    class T1,T2 theorem
